title: Useful Fletching Table
description: This mod makes the Fletching Table useful!
body:
**Ultimate Fletching Table Mod (Forge 1.20.1)**

**Description:**

Tired of that old, useless fletching table taking up space in your crafting corner? Transform it into a game-changing tool with the Ultimate Fletching Table Mod! This mod breathes new life into the fletching table, making it not just a decorative piece but a vital part of your survival strategy.

**Key Features:**

- **Functional Fletching Table:**

Finally, the fletching table has a purpose! By simply placing a normal fletching table into a crafting table, you can upgrade it to the Useful Fletching Table.

- **Enhanced Arrow Crafting:**

Craft more arrows with fewer resources! Instead of the standard four arrows, now you can craft six arrows at a time. More bang for your buck, or should we say, more flight for your feathers!

**How to Use:**

- **Crafting the Useful Fletching Table:**

Place a normal fletching table into a crafting table.

Voilà! You’ll receive the Useful Fletching Table.

- **Crafting Arrows:**

Open the Useful Fletching Table interface.

Combine the necessary materials (flint, stick, and feather) to craft arrows.

Enjoy crafting six arrows at once instead of just four!

**Why You'll Love It:**

- **Efficiency:** Save time and resources with the improved arrow crafting recipe.

- **Usability:** Make the fletching table a core part of your gameplay.

- **Simplicity:** Easy to craft and use, perfect for both beginners and veteran players.
